spell.iss_csw.charge_ray_of_frost.guide: fire a ray of frost at the target. The impacted area explodes, dealing secondary damage.
spell.iss_csw.blizzard.guide: Target a single area summon a blizzard from above for the duration of the spell
spell.iss_csw.frostwhirl_slash.guide: Spin unleash a frost-imbued sweeping melee attack. Damage scales with your held weapon's melee damage and enchantments
spell.iss_csw.rime_veil.guide: Conjure a dense mist that grants true invisibility. Your first melee attack after breaking invisibility is a guaranteed critical hit
spell.iss_csw.summon_polar_bear.guide: Cast to summon an ride on a faster polar bear who will follow, protect, and fight for you, as well as providing a mount, even can jump!
spell.iss_csw.pinning_stake.guide: Hurl a stake that ensnares the target with magical roots, preventing all non-magical movement. Damage is doubled against targets that cannot be entangled.
spell.iss_csw.barrage_volley.guide: After a brief charge, continuously and rapidly fires a barrage of magic arrows forward
spell.iss_csw.hemovaporize.guide: Curses the target, causing their blood to magically vaporize, inflicting continuous life loss.
spell.iss_csw.totem_rite.guide: Place a hollow totem at the target location to invoke a ritual circle. Enemies within the area continuously take damage. If it slays a target, an undead totem is successfully created.
spell.iss_csw.spell_empowerment.guide: improve you cast next spell's level
spell.iss_csw.firefly_seeker.guide: Summons a swarm of fireflies that automatically track and attack the targeted enemy, dealing continuous damage.
spell.iss_csw.gust_pro.guide: Summons a powerful gust of wind that knocks back and damages entities in front of you. Entities that collide with blocks take additional damage.
spell.iss_csw.lob_creeper_chain.guide: Lob the head of a creeper forward that explodes in a medium radius around the impact and will conjure a ring of creeper heads that falls to the ground and explodes. The higher the level, the faster the projectile.
effect.iss_csw.rime_veil.description: Conjure a dense mist that grants true invisibility. Your first melee attack after breaking invisibility is a guaranteed critical hit
effect.iss_csw.spell_improve.description: improve you cast next spell's level
ui.iss_csw.cast_error_totem: No hollow totem available to cast
tooltip.iss_cws.nameless_set.name: Set effect:The Nameless
tooltip.iss_cws.nameless_set.desc: Equip all Nameless gear to activate a Mana Shield
tooltip.iss_cws.nameless_helmet_ability: Armor-piercing damage is still mitigated by Armor.
tooltip.iss_cws.nameless_chestplate_abil: Casting a spell has a chance to not trigger its Cooldown.
tooltip.iss_cws.nameless_boots_ability: : Converts Fall and Impact damage into Mana restoration.
death.attack.iss_csw.totem_rite: %1$s was made into totem of undying
death.attack.iss_csw.charge_ray_of_frost: %1$s was blasted by %2$s's ray of frost
death.attack.iss_csw.frostwhirl_slash: %1$s was sliced into two halves by frostwhirl slash
death.attack.iss_csw.pinning_stake: %1$s was impaled by a wooden stake.
advancements.iss_csw.root.title: Interlace SpellWeaves
advancements.iss_csw.root.description: Where the threads of magic intertwine
advancements.iss_csw.spell_forge.title: Spell Stitch
advancements.iss_csw.mix_spell.title: Cocktail!
